title: Imperial Space Force
content:
{{Top|ncl}} {{Noncanon|legends=1}} {{Organization |image= |name=Imperial Space Force |type=[[Navy/Legends|Navy]] |founder= |leader=*[[Emperor (The Star Wars)|Emperor]] [[Cos Dashit]] *[[General/Legends|General]] [[Darth Vader (The Star Wars)|Darth Vader]] *[[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Crispin Hoedaack]] {{C|[[First Lord of the Aquilaean System and Surrounding Territories]]}} |subgroup=*[[Jedi-Bendu]] *[[Knights of Sith]] |headquarters=[[Alderaan (The Star Wars)|Alderaan]] |locations=Throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] |formed= |founded= |fragmented= |reorganized= |dissolved= |restored= |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire (The Star Wars)|Galactic Empire]] }} The '''Imperial Space Force''' was the [[Space warfare/Legends|space warfare]] extensive branch of the [[New Galactic Empire|Galactic Empire]], as well as its primary military arm. Once overseen by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi-Bendu]], the personal protectors of the [[Emperor (The Star Wars)|Emperor]], it was later taken over in the wake of the [[Great Jedi Rebellion]] by the [[Knights of Sith|Knights of the Sith]] who assumed their place and conducted a systematic purge of the rival sect. Consisting mainly of [[Stardestroyer]]s, the [[Fleet|armada]] was reinforced by the myriad ranks of [[Stormtrooper (The Star Wars)|Stormtroopers]] and the [[Space Fortress]]. ==History== Established and supervised by the Jedi-Bendu, a cadre of [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguards]] that had faithfully defended the many Emperors for at least 100,000 years, the Imperial Space Force had expanded the Galactic Empire from the [[celestial equator]] to the [[Great Rift]]. However, the Great Jedi Rebellion would see the Jedi-Bendu come into conflict with the Emperor, leading to their expulsion and manhunt which in turn enabled the ascension of [[Cos Dashit]] to the position of sovereign and the Knights of the Sith assuming the mantle of his protectors. Decrying the [[Aquilaean system]]'s stance as the sole remaining state independent of the Galactic Empire and deeming the attempted negotiations with the Aquilaeans a waste, the Emperor announced the beginning of his upcoming campaign against them, which [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Crispin Hoedaack]] and [[General/Legends|General]] [[Darth Vader (The Star Wars)|Darth Vader]] - the true powers behind the scenes - would spearhead with the Imperial Star Force and the Space Fortress battle station at their disposal. The ambush and killing of [[King/Legends|King]] [[Kayos]] during General [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] daring [[Battle of the Space Fortress|attack]] daunted the Aquilaean [[Senator/Legends|Senators]] and [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Breha (The Star Wars)|Breha]] into pushing for a peaceful resolution and having the old Jedi-Bendu down. Following the self-destruction of the [[Hidden Fortress]], General Vader summoned [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Valorum (The Star Wars)|Valorum]], a Knight of the Sith, to find and eliminate General Skywalker and his ragtag rebel troop, with Stormtroopers and [[Hovertank|hover tanks]] also on the lookout for the fugitives. Ultimately, [[Annikin Starkiller]] and Princess [[Leia (The Star Wars)|Leia]] were captured by Imperial forces and hauled to the Space Fortress, awaiting execution at the behest of General Vader, only to escape with the aid of the disillusioned Prince Valorum. Shortly afterwards, General Skywalker and his assembled [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] assaulted and crippled the battle station, dealing a heavy blow to the Imperial Space Force and scoring the rebels' first major victory against the Galactic Empire.
==Behind the scenes== [[File:Alderaan-TSW1.jpg|thumb|[[Stardestroyer]]s of the Imperial Space Force]]The Imperial Space Force is called the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] or Imperial Fleet in the finished films and [[Star Wars Legends|Expanded Universe]]. Deriving from the original concepts, the creation of the galaxy's principal military force, the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]], by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] followed by its usurpation by the [[Sith]] and subsequent transformation into the oppressive [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Forces]] occurs in [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|Episode II]] and [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|Episode III]]. ==Appearances== *[[The Star Wars 1|''The Star Wars'' 1]] {{1st}} ==Sources== *[[The Star Wars rough draft|''The Star Wars'' rough draft]] *''[[The Making of Star Wars: The Definitive Story Behind the Original Film]]'' *{{DB|organization|theempire|Empire, the}} {{Interlang |tr=İmparatorluk Uzay Gücü }} [[Category:Imperial military units]]
